name: content_update_notification
description: Notifies the Telegram channel when content is updated in the member portal. Sends a short bilingual summary of what changed.

steps.notes: Receives POST from admin-web /content-editor/save with a summary of changed keys.

Formats a notification message listing which content sections were updated. Example: '✅ Innehållet uppdaterat / ይዘት ተቀይሯል

Ändrade sektioner: Meddelanden, Kommande aktiviteter
የተቀየሩ ክፍሎች: ማስታወቂያዎች, የቀረቡ ዝግጅቶች'
POST to Telegram Bot API sendMessage with chat_id=@kyrka_kanal. parse_mode=HTML for formatting.
